docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC., AN OHIO CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LIGHTNING COMPUTERS, INC. DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-31-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-31-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-11-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-31-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-31-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-02-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
